headline: How The Autodesk (ADSK) Investment Narrative Is Shifting On Mixed Analyst Signals
summary: Autodesk’s model fair value sits at US$331.62, with this update leaving that central price target estimate unchanged. Even with most firms trimming targets and Citi moving to a downgrade, the core valuation anchor in this framework has not shifted, which reflects the mixed but still generally constructive tone in recent research. Read on to see how to interpret these signals and track the evolving analyst narrative around Autodesk from here. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Autodesk shifts...
